title: Dab@rath #1705
definition:
Dabareh or Daberath = "word"

 1) a Levitical city, modern 'Debarieh',situated at the western foot
    of Tabor
nasbUsage:
Definition: Dabareh or Daberath = "word"

 1) a Levitical city, modern 'Debarieh',situated at the western foot
    of Tabor

    NASB:  a Levitical city in Issachar
